title: RealisticMC
description: A realism-focused modpack that enhances visuals and gameplay mechanics without breaking the original Minecraft experience
body:
I created a custom modpack for a more realistic Minecraft experience!
With this pack, the game's visuals and mechanics feel more natural and immersive

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UpQYVR3icMU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Mods included:**
- [EMF] Entity Model Features
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features
- 2D Projectiles ➵
- AmbientSounds
- Animal Garden - Meerkat
- Animal Garden - Owl
- Animal Garden - Porcupine
- Astrocraft
- Better Animations Collection
- Better Trees
- Biomes O' Plenty
- Camera Overhaul
- Carry On
- Cave Dust
- Connectible Chains [Fabric]
- Countered's Terrain Slabs
- Distant Horizons
- Do a Barrel Roll
- Elytra Physics
- EnhancedVisuals
- Explosive Enhancement
- Fancy Block Particles - Renewed
- Farmer's Crops
- Flowing Fluids
- Hold My Items
- IllagerBlabber
- Immersive UI
- Immersive Winds
- ImmersiveThunder
- Iris Shaders
- Larion World Generation
- Make Bubbles Pop
- Model Gap Fix
- More Mobs
- Nether Weather
- Particle Rain
- Particular
- Perception
- Physical Falling Trees
- Physics Mod
- Presence Footsteps
- Realistic Bees
- Realistic Campfires
- Realistic Fire Spread
- Serene Seasons
- Shoulder Surfing Reloaded
- Smooth Scrolling
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Subtle Effects
- Toms Mobs
- Tough As Nails
- Vectorientation
- Visuality
- Wakes
- YUNG's Better Dungeons
- YUNG's Better End Island
- YUNG's Better Jungle Temples
- YUNG's Better Mineshafts
- YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses
- YUNG's Better Ocean Monuments
- YUNG's Better Strongholds
- YUNG's Better Witch Huts
- YUNG's Better Desert Temples

My goal is to enhance Minecraft without changing its original feel, making exploration and gameplay more realistic and enjoyable
